summary: Comprehensive testing of JAPAP Messenger - all backend APIs (24/24 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly. Auth, Wallet, Messaging, Admin, and User endpoints all functional.

issues: Transaction history shows '0 transactions au total' text even when transactions exist (minor text sync issue)

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns (routes, database, auth)
PostgreSQL schema is comprehensive with proper indexes
JWT auth with httpOnly cookies implemented correctly
Brute force protection with login_attempts table working
Admin seed function properly updates password if changed
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup, test user created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Auth (login/register/logout/me), Wallet (balance/deposit/withdraw/send/transactions), Messaging (conversations/send), Admin (stats/users/transactions/audit-logs), Users (search/profile). PostgreSQL database with proper schema. French language UI. WebSocket via Socket.IO at /api/socket.io.

frontend_ui_tests: Login page loads with French UI
Wallet page accessible with balance display
Admin page accessible for admin user
Non-admin user redirected from admin page
